name: Molho Malageuta (Malagueta Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chiles in the wine bottle.
2. Add the vinegar and olive oil to fill the bottle.
3. Securely cork the bottle.
4. Place the bottle in the refrigerator.
5. Let steep for at least 2 weeks, shaking the bottle occasionally.
6. If malagueta chiles are unavailable, substitute with tabasco or piquins.
Note: This recipe was submitted by DONW1948@aol.com on November 11, 1995.
